title: climate-dashboard — P-CLIMATE-UI: Interactive Climate Entropy Dashboard for the GenesisAeon stack
description:
Interactive Climate Entropy Dashboard for the GenesisAeon stack – visualizes duality, modulation, UTAC thresholds, mandala resonance and sonification output.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P-CLIMATE-UI, domain: ERA5 climate dashboard / UTAC visualization).

Dual-licensed: source code under GPL-3.0-or-later, documentation under CC BY 4.0.

See github.com/GenesisAeon/climate-dashboard for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
